title: Finolex Cables Holdings Services is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Finolex Cables Holdings Services is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Cables Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Allahabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Finolex Cables Holdings Services:
Finolex Cables Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Cables Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
